title: 3 x Pan Aroma Cotton Fresh Air Freshener Trigger Spray 250ml – Long-Lasting Fresh Linen Scent
features: 🏡 Refreshing Cotton Fresh Scent – Enjoy the crisp, clean aroma of freshly washed linen for a comforting and inviting home.
💦 Easy-to-Use Trigger Spray – Designed for effortless application, ensuring a fine mist for even fragrance distribution.
🌬️ Instant Odor Elimination – Effectively neutralizes unwanted smells, replacing them with a fresh and airy scent.
✅ Perfect for Any Space – Ideal for use in living rooms, bedrooms, offices, bathrooms, and more.
📦 Value Pack of 3 (750ml Total) – Get long-lasting freshness with this convenient multipack, great for everyday use.
description: Product description Bring the freshness of clean linen into your home with Pan Aroma Cotton Fresh Air Freshener Trigger Spray. This easy-to-use trigger spray bottle releases a fine mist, ensuring even coverage and a long-lasting fresh scent. The cotton fresh fragrance instantly eliminates odors, creating a calm and inviting atmosphere. With this pack of 3 (750ml total), you’ll always have a bottle on hand to keep your space smelling fresh. Ideal for homes, offices, and even cars, simply spray and enjoy a burst of refreshing clean linen aroma anytime. ✨ Revitalize your home with the scent of freshly laundered linens! ✨ Ingredients Spray
